banner.title: CBSE EXAMS POSTPONED (MAR 5–6)
banner.subtitle: Circular-2 dated Mar 3 (CBSE) — 7 Gulf countries affected

cbse.summary: CBSE has postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for Mar 2 and (per Circular-2 dated Mar 3) also for Mar 5–6, 2026 in 7 Middle East countries. Fresh dates will be announced later; next review is Mar 5 for exams from Mar 7 onwards.
cbse.issuedBy: Controller of Examinations, Dr. Sanyam Bhardwaj

embassies.note: Embassy operating emergency-only; regular consular services closed until further notice.

airlines.name: Emirates
airlines.crisisNote: All scheduled Emirates flights to/from Dubai remain suspended until 23:59 UAE time on 4 Mar. Limited repatriation/freighter flights may operate on 3–4 Mar; do not go to airport unless notified by Emirates. Rebook to travel on/before 20 Mar or request refund for bookings on/before 10 Mar.

airlines.name: Etihad Airways
airlines.crisisNote: All scheduled commercial flights to/from Abu Dhabi suspended until 14:00 UAE time Wed, 4 Mar (Etihad flight status notice). Eligible tickets: free rebooking/changes and refunds; rebooking waivers apply for bookings before 28 Feb (travel originally up to 5 Mar) with flexibility through 15 Mar.

airlines.name: Qatar Airways
airlines.crisisNote: Operations temporarily suspended due to closure of Qatari airspace. Next update expected by 4 Mar 09:00 Doha time; flights resume only after Qatar CAA announces safe reopening.

airlines.name: Air India
airlines.crisisNote: Air India has extended temporary suspension of all flights to/from the Middle East until 23:59 IST on 3 Mar. Contact 24/7 support: +91 1169329333 / +91 1169329999.

airlines.name: IndiGo
airlines.crisisNote: Select international flights using Middle East airspace temporarily suspended until 23:59 IST on 2 Mar (per IndiGo advisory/X). Waivers/flexibility for travel to/from Middle East and other impacted sectors valid until 7 Mar for bookings made on/before 28 Feb.

airlines.name: Air India Express
airlines.crisisNote: All westbound international flights to/from Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and UAE suspended until 23:29 IST on 2 Mar. For bookings made on/before 28 Feb (travel scheduled until 5 Mar): free reschedule or full refund.

airlines.name: flydubai
airlines.crisisNote: Operations impacted by regional airspace restrictions; check flight status and do not go to airport unless advised by airline. Expect cancellations/delays.

airlines.name: Air Arabia
airlines.crisisNote: Flights impacted by regional situation; check flight status before travel. Free rescheduling/refunds may apply per airline policy.

airlines.name: Akasa Air
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to/from Abu Dhabi, Doha, Jeddah, Kuwait and Riyadh suspended until 2 Mar. For affected bookings up to 7 Mar: reschedule at no cost or full refund.

airlines.name: SpiceJet
airlines.crisisNote: SpiceJet cancelled all flights between India and UAE until 1 Mar; check current flight status before heading to airport.

advisories.title: CBSE Circular-2: Middle East exams postponed (Mar 5–6)
advisories.summary: CBSE postponed Class X/XII exams scheduled for Mar 5–6, 2026 in Bahrain, Iran, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and UAE. Fresh dates will be announced later; Board will review situation on Mar 5 for exams from Mar 7 onwards.

advisories.title: DGCA Advisory: Avoid select Middle East FIRs
advisories.summary: DGCA advisory directs Indian operators to avoid 11 specified FIRs in Middle East/West Asia due to evolving security situation. Valid until Mar 2, 2026 (unless extended).

advisories.title: MEA Advisory: Visa extension help via FRRO (India)
advisories.summary: MEA advised foreign nationals stranded in India due to the crisis to contact FRRO/FRO for visa extension and assistance.

resources.title: MADAD Portal (MEA)
resources.description: Register consular grievances and seek assistance from Indian missions abroad.

resources.title: Kerala NORKA Helpdesk
resources.description: Kerala government helpdesk for expatriates impacted by Gulf crisis.

madad.description: MEA MADAD portal for Indians abroad to register grievances and seek consular assistance.

meaCentral.description: MEA 24x7 Crisis Control Room (India) for Gulf/West Asia situation.

disclaimer: Information is compiled from official sources and credible reports for public help. Always verify with your airline/embassy before travel. This site is a crisis information hub, not an official government service.
